changes.check: CB-1 reality — PII console logging confirmed
changes.citation: frontend/app/services/analysis.ts line 96: console.log('AnalysisService.startAnalysis() called with payload:', data) — logs full payload object. Line 98: console.log('User data:', data.user) — logs user demographics. Line 103: console.log('Request body:', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)) — full JSON serialisation of health data. Lines 107-120: console.group('[TRACE] Outgoing Analysis Payload') block including console.log('[TRACE] Full Payload JSON:', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)). Line 104: console.log('Outgoing payload:', data). Line 132: console.log('Response status:', response.status, ...). Line 164: console.log('Response data:', result). All match audit citations exactly.

backend/app/routes/upload.py lines 42-46: @router.post('/parse') async def parse_upload(file: Optional[UploadFile] = File(None), text_content: Optional[str] = Form(None)) — signature has no auth dependency. Contrast with backend/app/routes/analysis.py line 97: auth_user: CurrentUser = Depends(require_analysis_submitter). Auth dependency is absent.

changes.check: CB-2 auth pattern — require_analysis_submitter usable for /parse
changes.citation: backend/core/dependencies/analysis_auth.py lines 46-53: require_analysis_submitter() accepts Annotated[Optional[HTTPAuthorizationCredentials], Depends(_bearer_optional)] and optional X-Test-Auth-User-Id header. Raises HTTP 401 for unauthenticated callers in production mode. Test mode bypass via HEALTHIQ_MODE=test + X-Test-Auth-User-Id. Import is already present in analysis.py (line 59-62). No new auth mechanism required.

changes.check: CB-3 reality — Unicode mu mismatch confirmed
changes.citation: backend/core/units/registry.py line 102: _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS = frozenset({'µmol/L', 'umol/L', 'uMol/L'}). Set contains U+00B5 (MICRO SIGN) only. Does NOT contain U+03BC (GREEK SMALL LETTER MU). _units_equivalent() at lines 107-118 checks from_u in _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS — U+03BC returns False. Urate is in _STRICT_CONVERSION_BIOMARKERS (line 99 via _URATE_BIOMARKERS at line 80). _convert_with_explicit_unit() at lines 315-357: _units_equivalent(U+03BC, base_unit_U+00B5) returns False; no explicit conversion factor for U+03BC input in urate branches (lines 278-285 check to_u in _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS — correct for mg/dL input, but from_u in _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS check at line 282 would fail for U+03BC from_unit); factor is None; biomarker is in _STRICT_CONVERSION_BIOMARKERS → raises UnitConversionError.

changes.check: CB-3 fix design — minimal safe additive change
changes.citation: backend/core/units/registry.py line 102. Fix: add 'μmol/L' (U+03BC) to _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS frozenset. Additive only — existing U+00B5 and umol/L behaviour is unchanged. _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS used in three places: _units_equivalent() (line 112), _get_conversion_factor() urate branches (lines 278-285 check to_u/from_u in _UMOL_EQUIVALENTS), value_and_reference_units_coherent_for_numeric_compare() (line 575). Adding U+03BC only allows currently-failing cases to succeed. No conversion factors change. No base units change. No clinical thresholds change. Urate base unit (µmol/L) unchanged.

apply_unit_normalisation() in registry.py is called at backend/app/routes/analysis.py line 173: normalized = apply_unit_normalisation(normalized). This is the Layer A ingestion path. The frozenset addition is purely additive: inputs that previously raised UnitConversionError now succeed. The conversion result for U+03BC input is identical to U+00B5 input (both resolve to base unit µmol/L with factor 1.0). No downstream scoring, ranking, or output changes for inputs that previously succeeded.

changes.check: CB-4 reality — unsafe billing defaults confirmed
changes.citation: backend/env.example line 123: HEALTHIQ_FREE_COMPLETED_ANALYSES=99 (uncommented, active default). Line 127: HEALTHIQ_DISABLE_BILLING_ENFORCEMENT=1 (uncommented, active default). Both are active values. Labels describe them as dev-only but values are enabled. Fix: comment out both lines, replace with safe commented examples.
Single unit registry at backend/core/units/registry.py. Single auth module at backend/core/dependencies/analysis_auth.py. No parallel implementations detected in codebase.
